The attempt passes artifact-contract checks, but there are three substantive issues to address before full verification: (1) the workbook (.xlsx) could not be programmatically parsed in this environment (openpyxl_unavailable), leaving formulas/provenance unverified; (2) cost-consequence mapping to the declared decision_budget_usd is missing (rubric item ri_3 scored low); and (3) internal metadata inconsistency across grader outputs (passed/failed criteria lists) should be normalized. Fixes should include a parseable workbook or formula export, explicit Inputs & Provenance mapping in the workbook, explicit dollar cost estimates tied to decision_budget_usd and a short mitigation/budget plan, and correction of inconsistent metadata.
label: positive
